sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Another year. Critical equipment malfunction. The colony feels hopeful. My faith grows stronger.
Year 64 on Mars. Critical equipment malfunction. Morale is hopeful. We have 320 food units left.
Population: 29. Critical equipment malfunction. I spent the year on hydroponics. Closest to Vulcan-23.

meta_awareness: Lyra (year 64): 'I ran a sub-sim today and watched the tiny colonists deliberate. They seemed so real. Are we equally small to someone watching us?'
